status: 2026-05-13 진행 중. M1/M2 100% done. PR #86~#96 (11건) 머지. M2 1차 완성 sprint 가 사용자/조직 관리 대부분 흡수 — 매트릭스 M3 정의의 source-of-truth = development_roadmap.md §3 로 정합화 진행 중. 현재 sprint claude/work_260513-k — M3/M4 drift 정합 (development_roadmap §3 본문 + 매트릭스 §2.3.1/§2.3.2 RM-M3/M4 정의 표 + §3 도메인 행 정합 + state.json m3/m4 후보 분리).
head_summary: Merge pull request #96 (feat(auth),docs(adr,api,traceability),test: M3 진입 전 잔여 후속 일괄)

M0.notes: Authentication and authorization gate normalized. SEC-1..SEC-4 resolved.

M1.notes: T-M1-01..08 모두 완결. RBAC track via PR #20-23, #29-31, #27, #28 (2026-05-08). PR-B + PR-C via #56 (envelope + types + WS + CommandStatus enum + dry-run/live boundary, 2026-05-11). PR-D via #57 (audit actor enrichment + request_id middleware + 000008 마이그레이션 + Codex P1 fix-up SetTrustedProxies(nil), 2026-05-11).

M2.notes: login_action sprint (2026-05-08): PR-LOGIN-1/2 (backend login + frontend form). work_26_05_11 sprint (2026-05-11): logout(#45/#51) + account password(#50) + deploy guide(#49). Track S (#52-#55) ships system_admin gating + /admin/settings + accounts admin endpoints + org chart drag/leader.
M2.first_completion_sprint: claude/login_usermanagement_finish (PR #85, 2026-05-12 머지) — M2 1차 완성 sprint: 로드맵 정합 + UX hygiene 묶음 (PR-UX1+2+3) + Kratos settings/password/after webhook → audit_logs (PR-M2-AUDIT) + 30 TC e2e 게이트 추가.

CI.notes: GitHub Actions CI 도입. PR #86 (gemini/prepare-github-action) — backend-unit (go test ./...) + frontend-unit (Vitest) + e2e (Playwright 40 TC) 3잡. PR #87 (claude/work_260513-a) — playwright install scope (chromium 단일), actions/cache@v4 (go mod + ms-playwright), frontend readiness 120s, playwright install split. ADR-0003 + PR #88 (claude/work_260513-b) — no-docker 정책 CI 확장으로 services: postgres 제거 + pgdg native PG15 (pg-14 dropcluster + --port=5432 강제). FU-CI-1..4 모두 처리 완료.

Governance.notes: PR #89 (claude/work_260513-c) — docs/governance/ (README + document-standards.md) + docs/traceability/ (README + conventions.md + sync-checklist.md + report.md) + .github/pull_request_template.md + AGENTS/GEMINI 진입점 안내. 1차 종합 매트릭스: REQ-FR 105 + REQ-NFR 26 + ARCH 17 + API 40 + RM 28 + IMPL 79 + UT 47 + TC 37 = 412 항목, 도메인 그룹 13행. PR #90 (claude/work_260513-d) — §5 gap 표 형식 통일 + §5.2/§5.3 일부 closed + 메타 헤더 표준화 9 문서.

frontend.phase: Phase 6 done + frontend wire/UI types split (PR-B2). auth flow complete (login + logout + callback + account); /admin/settings shell live with users/organization/permissions sub-routes; sidebar gates system menu on actor.role.
frontend.auth: OIDC code flow with PKCE end-to-end. tokenStore persists access/refresh/id; apiClient auto Authorization. AuthGuard 401 -> /login + system route gate. Header Sign Out drives Hydra /oauth2/sessions/logout via id_token_hint, Kratos cookie killed via fetch.
frontend.rbac: PermissionEditor at /admin/settings/permissions wired to /api/v1/rbac/policies. defaultLandingFor + isSystemAdmin + pathRequiresSystemAdmin in lib/auth/role-routing.ts.

backend.phase: M1 + M2 done. Auth proxy: /api/v1/auth/{login,logout,token,signup,consent} + accounts admin (/api/v1/accounts {POST/PUT password/PATCH/DELETE}). Audit enrichment (source_ip/request_id/source_type) + requireRequestID middleware + CommandStatus enum + envelope alignment.
backend.auth: BearerTokenVerifier (Hydra introspection) + enforceRoutePermission. Logout: Hydra accept + revoke. Accounts admin proxies Kratos admin. SetTrustedProxies(nil) so audit_logs.source_ip cannot be forged via X-Forwarded-For.
backend.test_check: PASS — go test ./... (httpapi: 10 accounts admin + 11 logout + 5 envelope + 4 audit enrichment + auth + RBAC; domain: CommandStatus 36-cell matrix).
backend.rbac: rbac_policies seeded with developer/manager/system_admin. /api/v1/accounts gated as security:create / security:edit / organization:edit / organization:delete.
backend.auth_envs: DEVHUB_HYDRA_ADMIN_URL, DEVHUB_HYDRA_PUBLIC_URL (revoke), DEVHUB_KRATOS_PUBLIC_URL (login), DEVHUB_KRATOS_ADMIN_URL (signup + accounts admin).
backend.request_context: X-Request-ID 응답 헤더 + audit_logs.request_id 동일값. caller-supplied X-Request-ID 우선, 없으면 req_<hex24> 자동 생성 (DEC-3=B).

infra_idp.scaffold: infra/idp/ (hydra.yaml, kratos.yaml, schemas, scripts) — verified 2026-05-08 sandbox.
infra_idp.deploy_guide: docs/setup/test-server-deployment.md — native binary, no-docker, full e2e flow.

tdd_followups: PR-T5 (CI 도입, DEC-4) — PARTIAL-DONE: PR #86 (2026-05-13 머지) 으로 backend-unit + frontend-unit + e2e (Playwright 40 TC) 3잡 GHA 도입 완료. 본 sprint claude/work_260513-a 가 FU-CI-2/3/4 처리. 잔여 follow-up: FU-CI-1 (no-docker policy 정합).
hygiene-test-admin — PoC `test/test` 시드 제거 (운영 진입 직전, test-server-deployment §10 체크리스트).
ci_decisions_2026_05_13: ADR-0003 (2026-05-13) — no-docker 정책이 CI 까지 적용됨을 명문화. `.github/workflows/ci.yml` 의 `services: postgres:15` sidecar 제거 + pgdg apt repo 로 native PostgreSQL 15 설치하는 step 으로 교체. 본 결정으로 FU-CI-1 항목 처리 완료.
m2_followups: Kratos webhook 수신 → DevHub audit_logs 통합 (self-service password 변경 등 audit)
Hydra JWKS / introspection verifier 실구현 (현재는 introspection 기반)
pr_d_followups_closed_by_work_260513_e: ctx 표준 request_id 전파 — `requireRequestID` 가 c.Request.Context() 에도 stash, `requestIDFromContext` + `logRequestCtx` ctx-aware helper. kratos_login_client.go 2건 + kratos_identity_resolver.go 1건 치환.
writeRBACServerError → writeServerError 통합 — rbac.go 의 helper 제거 + 11 호출 일괄 치환.
ux_hygiene: /account 폼의 current_password 라벨 — Kratos privileged session 안내 보강

next_actions.ops_verification: 사용자 환경에서 docs/setup/test-server-deployment.md 의 §6-§7 e2e 절차 1회 수행 권장. E2E baseline 자동화는 PR #58 이후 `cd frontend && npm run e2e` 한 줄. PR #76 hardening 으로 stale rotation 도 다음 실행에서 자동 복구.
